description_long: This house features a single-story, L-shaped layout with a flat roof and enclosed courtyard. The exterior walls are a uniform beige color, punctuated by several rectangular windows and a main entry door. Inside the courtyard, there are two wooden picnic tables and a black barbecue grill, suggesting an outdoor social or dining area. The interior space visible from the courtyard includes a kitchen or bar area with shelving and a counter. The structure is primarily constructed from concrete or stucco, with wooden and metal elements for the furniture and fixtures. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, with minimal decorative features and a focus on functional outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story L-shaped house with a flat roof, beige exterior, and an enclosed courtyard featuring picnic tables and a grill.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the open courtyard with two picnic tables, a grill, and the main entry door, as well as the kitchen/bar area inside.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the long exterior wall with two large windows and a partial view into the courtyard.
description_view_2: View 2 highlights the courtyard from the opposite side, showing both picnic tables and the open space within the L-shaped structure.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the kitchen/bar area and the rear of the courtyard, with the picnic tables and grill visible from a different angle.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door opening into the courtyard, no porch or decorative elements, direct access to outdoor living area.
